series_metadata.series_title: Mandatory Pooling Correspondence, Comments, and Objections
series_metadata.series_description: Correspondence, comments, or objections filed with the Division regarding a specific mandatory pooling application, or generally regarding the mandatory pooling program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 2 years. If paper records are scanned into an electronic format, the paper copy may be shredded at that time. ; Electronic: 2 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
